titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the William J. Minor Horse Racing Papers
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke Staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday December 7, 2018 at 04:28
Transformed with yale.addEadidUrl.xsl. Adds @url with handle for finding aid. Overwrites @url if already present.
beinecke.minor.xml converted for compliance with Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines with brbl-migrate-01.xsl (mr2007-08-13).

PUBLIC "-//Yale University::Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library//TEXT (US::CtYBR::::[WILLIAM J. MINOR HORSE RACING PAPERS ])//EN" "minor.xml" converted from EAD 1.0 to 2002 by v1to02.xsl (sy2003-10-15).

did.unittitle: William J. Minor horse racing papers

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: Contains letters to Minor regarding horse racing and horse pedigrees, including letters from Cadwallader R. Colden and Sanders Dewees Bruce; notes on horse races and pedigrees; proceedings of the Natchez Jockey Club, of which Minor was secretary; manuscript articles about horses, possibly by Minor; and an obituary for Minor from "Turf, Field, and Farm."

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Gift of Mrs. David Wagstaff, 1951 and 1954.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The William J. Minor Horse Racing Papers are the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: William J. Minor Horse Racing Papers. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.
Box 3: Restricted fragile material. Reference surrogates have been substituted in the main files. For further information consult the appropriate curator.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: This finding aid was produced from a previously existing card set in the Manuscripts Catalog, or from another inventory. All pertinent bibliographical information has been retained. If the collection also contains unlisted or unsorted material, this has been noted in the box-and-folder list.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: This finding aid encompasses accessions of materials pertaining to William J. Minor and horse racing.

p.ref: See: G. B. Williams, Box 1, folder 26
See: G. B. Williams, Box 1, folder 26
See: G. B. Williams, Box 1, folder 26
See: G. B. Williams, Box 1, folder 26
See: Thomas T. Smith, Box 1, folder 22

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Also signed by A. G. Peters.

did.unittitle: "Mem[oranda] of the Time Made by Various Horses Over Various Courses in the M[etairie] J[ockey Club]," holograph
"Proprietors of Metairie Race Course Organizing a Club," manuscript
"Record of the Proceedings of the Natchez Jockey Club," holograph

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Minor was Secretary. Includes clipping pasted in.

did.unittitle: "Time of the Races Run at New Orleans and Elsewhere," holograph
Agreement, manuscript, signed by Minor, to train Mr. Peters' horse
Clipping (annotated) regarding horse race on 1859 Dec 16

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: From Turf, Field, and Farm , 1869 Oct 22.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Box 3: Restricted fragile material. Reference surrogates have been substituted in the main files. For further information consult the appropriate curator.
